message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): write-skew tests + wire schema alignment (bd-iwu.4, bd-3ipx)

bd-iwu.4: 6 write-skew detection tests covering sum constraint,
mutual exclusion, 3-way cycle, read-only anomaly, serialized mode,
and indexed lookups.

bd-3ipx: Aligned wire payload schemas to §5.9.0.1 spec — fixed
ReservePayload (20→24B), SpillPageEntry (24→32B), RowidReservePayload
(28→32B), SubmitWalPayload schema_epoch u32→u64, and tagged union
padding. Added 9 unit tests and raw-len validation helper.

Also fixed: clippy use_self in cx.rs, send_with_fd mut parameter,
redundant clone in test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
